content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于2月9日20:30(UTC+8) 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2026年2月23日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【问题修复】
● 修复了活动「疾驰的欢愉专列」中，造物「小 N 的相机」黄金调和效果会错误影响物象研究深度的问题，应当仅影响灵识研究深度。
● 修复了活动「疾驰的欢愉专列」中，遭遇「梭行维度之犬」后，禁止抽牌的效果会错误继承至下场战斗的问题。
● 修复了活动「疾驰的欢愉专列」中，敌人「缸中之脑」的意图「等价交换」会错误降低生命上限的问题。
● 修复了活动「疾驰的欢愉专列」中，造物图标上的计数可能会不显示的问题。
● 修复了活动「疾驰的欢愉专列」中，血肉界域「猩红熔炉」上限数值错误的问题。
● 修复了活动「疾驰的欢愉专列」中，共鸣点「一千零一个朵尔」在战斗中的共鸣效果未生效的问题。
● 修复了敌人「超维之蛹」翅膀出现强烈白色光芒的问题。
● 修复了探索内「事件」选项同时获得两个造物时，造物详情下方会额外显示一个白框的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「皮克曼」的指令卡「绘影摹形」获取的创构造物，下回合仅移除了效果，但图标存在残留的问题。
● 修复星辰篇造物「虫群意识」未受归档刻痕影响导致数值错误的问题。
● 修复了「共鸣」界面右下方的需要消耗的「共鸣粒子」图标和数量未居中对齐的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」结算时未正确显示获得同调率数值的问题。
● 英语语言设置下，修复了「血链·希洛」启灵1描述错误表述为「造成15%出血伤害」的问题，正确表述应为「触发15%出血伤害」。
● 英语语言设置下，修复了「相位对弈」中命轮「被缚的歌谣」中数值未正确显示的问题。
● 英语语言设置下，统一了剧情文本中「汀克特」和「菲茵特」的故乡「荒星(the Desolate/Desolate Planet)」的译名。
● 修复了俄语、韩语语言设置下，少量文本显示为中文的问题。我们将持续修复其他语种的翻译缺失问题。
● 修复了繁体中文语言设置下，部分文本显示错误的问题。

**V2.4.2.3 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on February 9 at 20:30(UTC+8) . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
 
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
 
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on February 23, 2026 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
 
[Bug Fix]
● Fixed the issue in the event "Rapture Express!" where the relic "N's Camera" golden harmony effect incorrectly affected the esoteric research depth, it should only affect the occult research depth.
● Fixed an issue in the event "Rapture Express!" where the effect of preventing draws after encountering "Dimensional Hounds" would incorrectly carry over to the next battle.
● Fixed an issue in the event "Rapture Express!" where the enemy "Brain in a Vat" incorrectly reduced the HP maximum when using the intent "Equivalent Exchange."
● Fixed an issue where the count on the Relic icon might not be displayed in the event "Rapture Express!".
● Fixed the issue with the maximum value error in the event "Rapture Express!" in the Caro Realm "Crimson Furnace."
● Fixed the issue where the resonance effect of the resonance point "One Thousand and One Dolls" was not activated during battles in the event "Rapture Express!"
● Fixed the issue with the enemy "Ultra Cocoon" wings emitting a strong white light.
● Fixed an issue where an extra white box would appear below the relic details when obtaining two relics simultaneously in the "Events" option during exploration.
● Fixed the Command Card "Lifelike Rendition" for the Awakener "Pickman," which resulted in the acquisition of the Relic. In the next turn, only the effect was removed, but there was an issue with the icon remaining.
● Fixed the issue where the Astral Reign relic "Swarm Mind" was not affected by the Archive Mark, resulting in incorrect values.
● Fixed the issue where the "Resonance" particle icon and quantity at the bottom right of the interface were not center-aligned.
● Fixed the issue where the Affinity value was not displayed correctly during Traphase settlement.
● In the English language setting, the issue with the description of "Helot: Catena" Enlighten 1 being incorrectly stated as "deals 15% Bleed DMG" has been fixed; the correct statement should be "triggers 15% Bleed DMG."
● In the English language settings, fixed the issue where the values were not displayed correctly in "Song of the Bound" in "Traphase" of the Wheel of Destiny.
● Under the English language setting, the names "Tinct" and "Faint" for the homeland "the Desolate" have been standardized in the story text.
● Fixed the issue where a small amount of text displayed in Chinese under the Russian and Korean language settings. We will continue to address translation missing issues in other languages.
● Fixed an issue where some text displayed incorrectly under the Traditional Chinese language setting.
